# F037 Retrieval-Margin Gate

## Decision
`F037_RETRIEVAL_MARGIN_GATE_STILL_HELDOUT_BELOW_FLOOR`

## Purpose
F036 showed that F035 recall failures were near-tie nearest-neighbor flips. F037 uses train-only inner validation to reject any nonzero residual scale that breaks a floor-correct retrieval row, while still requiring transition, delta-cosine, and aggregate recall preservation.

## Selection Rule
`train-only inner-val residual scale must preserve transition/delta/recall and create zero broken floor-correct retrieval rows on inner validation`

## Mean Metrics
- selected residual scale mean: `0.500000`
- selected nonzero fraction: `0.800000`
- heldout local floor preserved: `False`
- selected transition: `0.339319`
- floor transition: `0.333054`
- selected delta cosine: `0.934183`
- floor delta cosine: `0.912222`
- selected recall@1: `0.866667`
- floor recall@1: `0.859259`
- selected floor gap transition: `0.006265` (min `0.000000`)
- selected floor gap delta cosine: `0.021960` (min `0.000000`)
- selected floor gap recall: `0.007407` (min `-0.037037`)
- heldout broken rows: `5`
- heldout repaired rows: `6`
- inner-val broken rows mean: `0.000000`

## Promotion Status
No model is promoted. F037 is a train-only calibration test; even a pass can only justify future Tier 3/no-regression design.
